reference: NOW THE VOICE CAME FROM THE SKYLIGHT OVERHEAD APPARENTLY AND WITH A FIERCE IMPRECATION THE IRATE GAMESTER RUSHED UPON DECK AND RAN HITHER AND THITHER IN SEARCH OF HIS TORMENTOR
text: Now the voice came from the skylight overhead, apparently; and with a fierce imprecation the irate gamester rushed upon deck, and ran hither and thither in search of his tormentor.
